reviews.comment:
Me gusta ,tiene lo Aca siempre dio más un lugar de descanzo para el viajero,kiosco ,baños ,cancha ,fogones ,y descanzo

(Translated by Google)
I like it, it has what Aca always gave plus a resting place for the traveler, a kiosk, bathrooms, a court, stoves, and rest

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar parquizado con juegos para niños y fogones. Habria que reparar algunos juegos, no tiene lugares para poder sentarse

(Translated by Google)
Lovely park area with a children's playground and barbecue grills. Some of the playground equipment needs repair, and there's no seating.
